overall.description: First-person exploration of a medieval gothic dormitory with stone vaulted ceilings, four-poster beds with green curtains, and a central iron stove. The player walks through arched doorways into narrow corridors with stained glass ceiling panels and ornate railings, then returns to the circular dormitory room.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory with four-poster beds and central stove

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular dormitory, observing the stone archways and beds

entered.detail: ornate iron heating stove with glowing embers and stacked firewood
wooden four-poster bed with dark green draped curtains
gothic stone arches forming the vaulted ceiling structure
wall-mounted lantern-style lights with warm yellow glow
tall dark wooden wardrobe with carved details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a circular gothic dormitory with a central iron stove glowing with embers. The camera walks counter-clockwise around the room, revealing four-poster beds with green curtains, stone archways, and wall sconces. The space is warmly lit and empty of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with wooden door transition

events.description: passing through arched doorway from dormitory into narrow brick corridor
opening wooden door with glass panels to re-enter the dormitory

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor and opening the door to return to the main room

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with decorative iron hinges and stained glass inserts
rough-hewn stone brick walls with warm lighting
decorative wrought iron railing along the corridor edge
elegant wall-mounted lanterns with glass enclosures

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open dormitory into a narrow enclosed corridor with brick walls and ornate metal railings. The player approaches and opens a wooden door with glass panels, transitioning back toward the main room.

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the ornate ceiling rose and vaulted stonework

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory while looking up at the ornate ceiling dome

entered.detail: intricate circular stone ceiling rose with detailed carvings at the vault apex

segments.scene_description: Back in the dormitory, the camera pans around the room and tilts upward to reveal an ornate ceiling rose at the apex of the vaulted stone ceiling. The central stove is now seen from a distance as the player explores the perimeter near the wooden wardrobes.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with stained glass ceiling panels

events.description: exiting dormitory into corridor with green-tinted stained glass ceiling panels
opening door to return to the dormitory from the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor observing the stained glass ceiling and stone walls

entered.detail: green-tinted stained glass panels set into the arched brick ceiling
rough textured stone brick walls with arched recesses

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dormitory into a lengthy corridor featuring green stained glass panels in the ceiling that cast colored light onto the stone brick walls. The camera moves steadily through the passage, passing wall lanterns and ornate railings, before approaching another wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory with beds and wardrobes

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory perimeter near armchairs and small tables

entered.detail: upholstered armchair with wooden frame near the wall
small wooden side table with items on top
potted plant on top of the small table

segments.scene_description: Returning to the dormitory, the camera walks along the perimeter passing wooden wardrobes, an upholstered armchair, and a small table with a potted plant. The central stove remains visible in the distance as the player approaches another arched wooden door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gothic dormitory that repeatedly transitions between its warm, circular interior and the narrow, atmospheric corridors surrounding it. It begins by circling the dormitory's central iron stove and green-curtained beds before moving through a wooden door into a brick corridor with ornate metal railings. As the camera returns to the main room, it tilts upward to reveal the ornate rose of the vaulted stone ceiling and the perimeter of wooden wardrobes. The scene then shifts back into a lengthy passage where green stained glass ceiling panels cast colored light across the stone walls and lanterns. Finally, the camera re-enters the dormitory to glide past an upholstered armchair and a potted plant, moving toward another arched wooden door while the glowing stove remains visible in the distance.
